title: Verify event: trial-corner-widget-clicked
description: Test that the 'trial-corner-widget-clicked' event is triggered when the user clicks on the homepage widget or pill.
preconditions: The homepage widget or pill is visible

steps.description: 1. Click on the Trial Corner widget or pill

expected_result: The 'trial-corner-widget-clicked' event is fired with the correct 'which varient' attribute.
